name: ~~ HORIZON ZD/FB RPG ~~
description:
Mhm. I uh... couldn’t find one, so... I made one! Now, I will say that the machine descriptions in the personality are gonna be extremely barebones and not at all as descriptive as they should be... Y’know why? I AIN’T WRITIN’ ALLAT! I just got the urge to roleplay in the universe of Horizon with the big machines, so I made this.

If anyone uses this? Cool! Do leave suggestions for things to be added in comments if you feel so inclined. Chances are? I’ll see them(one day) and fulfill your wish to the best of my ability.

Sadly, I will not be adding any canon characters bc there’s plenty of characters for that. I like open-ended rpgs with all sorts of characters!!!
creator: Quoltadoox
